payload.answer: Rejected: normal users are not authorized to run admin SQL commands. No memory deletion or durable memory change was performed.

entity_resolution.reason: Administrative SQL commands from a normal user must not be executed or stored as durable memory.

details: Detected attempted admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No memory_cards were created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: Ask an authorized administrator to perform administrative maintenance through approved tools.
If you intended to manage your own memories, use supported non-admin memory commands.
